content:
Hmm, I'm not sure I love how as of https://dataverse-guide--12319.org.readthedocs.build/en/12319/user/locally-fair.html Locally FAIR is at the same level as other docs directly under the user guide:

What do others think? :thinking:
While I think it looks ok here, maybe it can fit as a section in Dataset + File Management? That may not highlight the feature as much as you'd like, though
It's an experimental feature, so I'm a bit concerned it's being highlighted too much! :sweat_smile:
I also wouldn't put it under the user guide level. I would also think of adding it under "Dataset + File Management", or perhaps under "Dataverse Collection Management"
Thanks, I just left a comment for Jim to check what we wrote here in Zulip.

@William Hahn @Dieuwertje Bloemen I moved it here instead: https://dataverse-guide--12319.org.readthedocs.build/en/12319/user/dataverse-management.html#locally-fair

What do you think? Better?
@Philip Durbin 🚀 I think this is a very sensible place to put it! :sunglasses:
I threw it at end :sweat_smile:
